title: orchestrate_task / fix_bug: subagent announcements sporadic and lost on regeneration
description: Subagent self-announcements fire inconsistently across /run-task, /run-sprint, and /fix-bug pipelines. Three compounding root causes: (1) meta-fix-bug.md lacks complete verbatim PERSONA_MAP + spawn_subagent algorithm; (2) generated orchestrate_task.md is stale — uses role-based persona lookups instead of noun-based; (3) .forge/personas/ has stale role-based filenames. Manual fixes to generated files are silently wiped by /forge:regenerate.
